# Luyanda Buthelezi Physiotherapy — lbphysiotherapy.co.za

Luyanda Buthelezi Physiotherapy is an HPCSA-registered practice in
Northriding, Fairland, Randburg, Gauteng, South Africa.

Led by Mr Luyanda Buthelezi — BSc Physiotherapy (Wits University),
HPCSA registered, BokSmart certified.

Services: post-operative rehabilitation, sports injuries, chronic back
and neck pain, headache management, pediatric physiotherapy,
ICU and acute care rehabilitation.

After-hours: Mon–Fri 14:00–18:00, Saturday 08:00–14:00.
Serving: Northriding, Fairland, Randburg, Fourways, Douglasdale,
Bryanston, Randpark Ridge, Olivedale, Johannesburg North.

Phone/WhatsApp: +27 73 948 0811
Book: https://www.lbphysiotherapy.co.za/appointment.html
Google: https://share.google/iWOIVCzx5bWQO6lU6
